name: Authy API
description: Authy API (by Twilio) provides two-factor authentication (2FA) services. The API supports user registration, TOTP verification, phone verification via SMS/voice, push authentication (OneTouch), and application management. Note: Authy has been deprecated since November 2022 in favor of Twilio Verify.
